properties.description:
Detects anomalies in data connector log volumes by comparing current log counts to 30-day averages, identifying significant deviations.

This query monitors the health and performance of data connectors feeding into Microsoft Sentinel by analyzing log volumes from various sources over the past 30 days. It calculates hourly averages to establish a baseline and compares these to logs from the last hour to identify significant deviations.

Specifically, the query detects "No Logs" (indicating a complete halt in log transmission), "Critical Spike" and "Elevated Spike" (indicating significantly higher log volumes, suggesting potential security incidents or increased activity), and "Critical Drop" and "Elevated Drop" (indicating significantly lower log volumes, which could point to misconfigurations or data source issues). The query provides detailed alerts for these anomalies, helping administrators proactively address potential issues with data connectors.
properties.query:
let LogsCount = union isfuzzy=true
        CommonSecurityLog, 
        AzureActivity, 
        AzureDiagnostics, 
        SecurityAlert, 
        SecurityIncident, 
        SigninLogs, 
        OfficeActivity, 
        DeviceNetworkEvents, 
        DeviceFileEvents, 
        DeviceImageLoadEvents, 
        DeviceProcessEvents, 
        DeviceRegistryEvents, 
        DeviceInfo
    // Add other relevant tables if needed
    | where 
        TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
    | extend 
        DataConnector = case(
                    Type == "CommonSecurityLog",
                    "Common Event Format (CEF) via AMA",
                    Type == "AzureActivity",
                    "Azure Activity",
                    Type == "AzureDiagnostics",
                    "Azure DDoS Protection",
                    Type == "SecurityAlert",
                    "Microsoft Defender",
                    Type == "SecurityIncident",
                    "Microsoft Defender",
                    Type == "SigninLogs",
                    "Microsoft 365",
                    Type == "OfficeActivity",
                    "Microsoft 365",
                    Type startswith "Device",
                    "Microsoft Defender for Endpoint",
                    "Other"
                )
    | where
        isnotempty(DataConnector)
    | make-series Count=count()
        default=0
        on TimeGenerated
        from ago(30d) to ago(1h)
        step 1h
        by DataConnector
    | mv-expand 
        Count, TimeGenerated
    | project-reorder 
        TimeGenerated, DataConnector, Count
    | extend 
        TimeGenerated = todatetime(TimeGenerated)
    | extend 
        Count = toint(Count);
let HourlyAverages = LogsCount
    | extend
        HourOfDay = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated)
    | summarize 
        HourlyAvg = avg(Count)
        by HourOfDay, DataConnector;
let CurrentHour = bin(now(), 1h);
let CurrentHourOfDay = datetime_part("hour", CurrentHour);
let AverageForCurrentHour = toscalar(HourlyAverages
    | where
        HourOfDay == CurrentHourOfDay
    | project
        HourlyAvg);
let LastHourLogsCount = union isfuzzy=true
        CommonSecurityLog, 
        AzureActivity, 
        AzureDiagnostics, 
        SecurityAlert, 
        SecurityIncident, 
        SigninLogs, 
        OfficeActivity, 
        DeviceNetworkEvents, 
        DeviceFileEvents, 
        DeviceImageLoadEvents, 
        DeviceProcessEvents, 
        DeviceRegistryEvents, 
        DeviceInfo
    | where 
        TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | extend 
        DataConnector = case(
                    Type == "CommonSecurityLog",
                    "Common Event Format (CEF) via AMA",
                    Type == "AzureActivity",
                    "Azure Activity",
                    Type == "AzureDiagnostics",
                    "Azure DDoS Protection",
                    Type == "SecurityAlert",
                    "Microsoft Defender",
                    Type == "SecurityIncident",
                    "Microsoft Defender",
                    Type == "SigninLogs",
                    "Microsoft 365",
                    Type == "OfficeActivity",
                    "Microsoft 365",
                    Type startswith "Device",
                    "Microsoft Defender for Endpoint",
                    "Other"
                )
    | where 
        isnotempty(DataConnector)
    | make-series Count=count()
        default=0
        on TimeGenerated
        from ago(1h) to now()
        step 1h
        by DataConnector
    | mv-expand 
        Count, TimeGenerated
    | project-reorder 
        TimeGenerated, DataConnector, Count
    | extend 
        TimeGenerated = todatetime(TimeGenerated)
    | extend 
        Count = toint(Count);
// CS-20974: Commenting out these variables, was causing issues with the math in the case statements below
// let MarginOfError50 = 0.50 * AverageForCurrentHour; // 50% margin of error
// let UpperThreshold50 = AverageForCurrentHour + MarginOfError50;
// let LowerThreshold50 = AverageForCurrentHour - MarginOfError50;
// let MarginOfError25 = 0.25 * AverageForCurrentHour; // 25% margin of error
// let UpperThreshold25 = AverageForCurrentHour + MarginOfError25;
// let LowerThreshold25 = AverageForCurrentHour - MarginOfError25;
// let StopThreshold = 0; // Assuming logs stop when Count is zero
LastHourLogsCount
| extend 
    HourOfDay = datetime_part("hour", TimeGenerated)    
| join 
    kind=inner (HourlyAverages)
    on HourOfDay, DataConnector
| extend  
    Alert = iff(DataConnector != "Microsoft Defender",
            case(
                Count == 0,
                "No Logs",
                HourlyAvg == 0,
                "Normal",
                Count > (HourlyAvg * 1.5),  //+50% margin of error
                "Critical Spike",
                Count > (HourlyAvg * 1.25), //+25% margin of error
                "Elevated Spike",
                Count < (HourlyAvg * 0.5),  //-50% margin of error
                "Critical Drop",
                Count < (HourlyAvg * 0.75), //-25% margin of error
                "Elevated Drop",
                "Normal"
                ),
            case(
                Count == 0,
                "No Logs",
                "Normal"
                )
            )
| where 
    Alert != "Normal"
| extend
    RuleName = "Sentinel Data Connector Anomaly Detection",
    RuleDescription = "Detects anomalies in data connector log volumes by comparing current log counts to 30-day averages, identifying significant deviations."
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    DataConnector,
    Count,
    HourlyAvg,
    Alert,
    RuleName,
    RuleDescription
